When presentingestimates, companies should back up assumptions with past trends, benchmark competitors credibly, and acknowledge risks.", "relevance_score": 0.5}, {"title": "YouTube MonetizationChecker(estimatedrevenue, stats and more)", "url": "https://isthischannelmonetized.com/tools/youtube-monetization-checker/", "snippet": "[Jina Parallel Content] Title: YouTube Monetization Checker (estimated revenue, stats and more) URL Source: https://isthischannelmonetized.com/tools/youtube-monetization-checker/ Published Time: 2024-10-17T15:48:53+02:00 Markdown Content: Get the estimated revenue based on the RPM of different categories (you can find the detail in our [YouTube CPM and RPM guide](https://isthischannelmonetized.com/data/youtube-cpm/)). In addition, this tool uses the YouTube Data API v3 to gather data about a channel, video or Short. ## What Data Does The YouTube Monetization Checker Show? ### Channel Data *   **Total views**: the number of views of all videos and Shorts combined (currently set to public), since the inception of the channel *   **Number of videos**: the number of public videos and Shorts, at the time of the analysis *   **Number of subscribers**: the current number of subscribers, not counting users who unsubscribed from the channel *   **Made for kids**: if the channel is set as a channel for kids globally (not for individual videos) *   **ID**: the ID of the channel (starting with \u201cUC\u201d) *   **Country**: the 2-letter country code of the channel *   **Creation date**: When the channel was created (which might be different from when the first video of the channel was published) ### Video / Short Data\n...\nTitle: YouTube Monetization Checker (estimated revenue, stats and more) URL Source: https://isthischannelmonetized.com/tools/youtube-monetization-checker/ Published Time: 2024-10-17T15:48:53+02:00 Markdown Content: Get the estimated revenue based on the RPM of different categories (you can find the detail in our [YouTube CPM and RPM guide](https://isthischannelmonetized.com/data/youtube-cpm/)). In addition, this tool uses the YouTube Data API v3 to gather data about a channel, video or Short. ## What Data Does The YouTube Monetization Checker Show? ### Channel Data *   **Total views**: the number of views of all videos and Shorts combined (currently set to public), since the inception of the channel *   **Number of videos**: the number of public videos and Shorts, at the time of the analysis *   **Number of subscribers**: the current number of subscribers, not counting users who unsubscribed from the channel *   **Made for kids**: if the channel is set as a channel for kids globally (not for individual videos) *   **ID**: the ID of the channel (starting with \u201cUC\u201d) *   **Country**: the 2-letter country code of the channel *   **Creation date**: When the channel was created (which might be different from when the first video of the channel was published) ### Video / Short Data *   **Published date**: the date on which the video was first made public *   **Type**: if the video is a regular video or a Short *   **Duration**: the exact duration, down to the second *   **Definition**: HD or SD\n...\n*   some channels may have videos that are not monetized while the channel itself is monetized *   and some channels may have videos that are monetized while the channel itself is not", "relevance_score": 0.85}]
